utterances.speaker: Mrs. Geller
utterances.text: What that Rachel did to her life ... We ran into her parents at the club , they were not playing very well .

emotion_cause.span: 1_What that Rachel did to her life ... We ran into her parents at the club , they were not playing very well .

utterances.speaker: Mr. Geller
utterances.text: I am not gonna tell you what they spent on that wedding ... but forty thousand dollars is a lot of money !

emotion_cause.span: 2_what they spent on that wedding ... but forty thousand dollars is a lot of money !

utterances.speaker: Mrs. Geller
utterances.text: Well , at least she had the chance to leave a man at the altar ...

utterances.speaker: Mr. Geller
utterances.text: Do not listen to your mother .

utterances.speaker: Mr. Geller
utterances.text: You are independent , and you always have been !

utterances.speaker: Mr. Geller
utterances.text: Even when you were a kid ... and you were chubby , and you had no friends , you were just fine !

utterances.speaker: Mr. Geller
utterances.text: And you would read alone in your room , and your puzzles ...
